extracted_by: HivemindMinion (Claude Code) from HivemindOverlord's licensed PoE2 install
schema_notes: Each entry has row_index, id, display_name, display_name_probed_offset, is_unused.
id is RELIABLE - it's the canonical internal name (e.g., 'Marauder1', 'Witch3', 'Witch3b' for variant Liches).

Row order reveals base class grouping: 0-2 Marauder, 3-5 Warrior (Titan/Warbringer/Smith of Kitava), 6-8 Ranger (Deadeye/Pathfinder/...), 9-11 Huntress (Amazon/Ritualist/Spirit Walker - the last is NEW in 0.5), 12-15 Witch (Infernalist/Blood Mage/Lich/Abyssal Lich), 16-18 Sorceress (Stormweaver/Chronomancer/Disciple of Varashta), 19+ Mercenary/Druid/Monk (Invoker/Acolyte of Chayula/Martial Artist - the last is NEW in 0.5).
Patch 0.5 NEW: Martial Artist (Monk family), Spirit Walker (Huntress family).
known_caveats: display_name field is BEST-EFFORT - the extractor's longest-string heuristic picks flavor text or art-asset paths rather than the proper display name. The id field is the load-bearing identifier; downstream code should map id->canonical name via src/parsers/ascendancy_resolver.py ASCENDANCY_TO_CLASS dict.

Resolving display_name properly requires either: (a) a PoB-style spec.lua for ascendancy.datc64 field layout, or (b) cross-referencing with the language-specific ascendancy.datc64 files (data/extracted/Data/data/balance/english/ascendancy.datc64 if it exists).
data_policy: Extracted exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install via the in-repo extraction pipeline. No third-party wiki / scraped data.
